## LibraryRuntime.IRuntimeIngredient.isDairy() method

Returns true if this is a dairy ingredient. When true, dairy-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isDairy(): this is IRuntimeDairyIngredient;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IRuntimeDairyIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.iruntimedairyingredient.md)
